summary: Warehouse lead reported that physical cycle counts 'almost always' disagree with the ERP, and that discrepancies are resolved by manually adjusting the ERP to match the count without root-cause review.
confidence_notes: First-hand account from the person performing counts; not yet corroborated against count records.
access_notes: Verbal statement captured in interview notes; no recording retained.
retention_notes: Interview notes held by consultant; formal retention policy to be defined in a later phase.
consultant_notes: Corroborate against the last cycle-count report and the adjustment log once ERP access is granted.
